daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are soft today, Virgo. Your analytical mind feels quieter, more intuitive. This is your cue to trust what you already know instead of overthinking. Let your gut lead for once—it's been right all along.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your energy shift. Whether single or coupled, authenticity is your love language today. Drop the perfectionism act and let people see the real, messy, beautiful you. That's what magnetizes connection.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is lowkey your superpower rn. A project or task that seemed boring might reveal its deeper purpose today. Find meaning in the small wins. Your consistent effort is building something bigger than you realize.
daily.health: Your nervous system could use some softness. Instead of another intense workout, try something grounding—a walk, stretching, or just sitting outside. Your body's asking for restoration energy, not more hustle. Listen to that.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been trying to tell you. Mercury's moving favorably, so clarity is coming—trust the whispers.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is peak energy for authentic connections. Stop performing and let people see the real you. The right ones will stay, and that's the whole point.
weekly.career: Your work momentum is building quietly. Small wins matter more than you think right now. Stay focused on what you can control and watch how opportunities align when you're not forcing things.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. Move in ways that feel good, nourish yourself without guilt, and create space for rest. Energy follows intention—set yours toward feeling genuinely better.
